# LLMs.txt
Site: https://ict.co

Purpose: ICT (Integrated Control Technology) is a global manufacturer of innovative access control and security solutions. The site showcases ICT’s full suite of hardware and software offerings, including integrated access control, intrusion detection, building automation, and mobile credentials. It also highlights technical resources, product documentation, and partner support for integrators and customers worldwide.

Target Audience:
- Security integrators and installers seeking unified access control solutions
- Enterprise and commercial facility managers evaluating building security systems
- ICT channel partners accessing product updates, support, and documentation
- End-users exploring security, intrusion detection, or mobile access options

Content Focus:
- Unified access control, intrusion detection, and automation systems
- Product documentation, specifications, and support tools
- Industry-specific use cases and integration guides
- Blog content on security trends, mobile credentials, and product updates

Unique Value:
The ICT site combines deep technical documentation with a modern user experience tailored for integrators and enterprise decision-makers. It positions ICT as a premium provider of unified, scalable access control technologies backed by global support and continuous innovation.


[ICT Unified Access Control & Intruder Detection Technology]
URL: https://ict.co/
Type: Homepage
Summary: Top rated manufacturer of unified access control systems. Designed in New Zealand. High security for SME & enterprise commercial. Smartphone & RFID card access It explores commercial security and access control and related topics.
Topics: commercial security and access control

[Card security 101 | ICT - Integrated Control Technology]
URL: https://ict.co/blog/card-security-101/
Type: Blog
Summary: We'll take you through the different types of technology, show you why some are much more effective than others, and arm you with the facts. It explores card security 101 and related topics.
Topics: card security 101

[Set Your Access Control Free with Wireless Locking | ICT]
URL: https://ict.co/blog/set-your-access-control-free-with-wireless-locking/

Summary: CT offers a full wireless locking solution with both our single-site Protege WX and enterprise-level Protege GX systems. It explores set your access control free with wireless locking and related topics.
Topics: set your access control free with wireless locking
